lines: Small acts of kindness light up the whole world, {player}!
Helping a friend is the best adventure of all.
You have such a kind spirit, {player}!
no_quest_line: The world is brighter because of you, {player}!
quest_offer_line: I have a special mission of kindness for you, {player}. Are you in?
quest_progress_line: Every little bit helps! Keep being kind, {player}!
quest_complete_line: You're a true kindness hero, {player}! Look how everything sparkles now.
